name: Breaking Bad
overview: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with cancer turns to making and selling methamphetamine.

name: Grey's Anatomy
overview: Surgical interns and residents navigate careers and relationships at a Seattle teaching hospital.

name: The Office
overview: A documentary-style comedy following the everyday lives of office employees at a Pennsylvania paper company.

name: Stranger Things
overview: When a boy disappears, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments and the supernatural.

name: Ted Lasso
overview: An American football coach is hired to manage an English soccer team despite having no experience.

name: Friday Night Lights
overview: A high school football coach and his community in small-town Texas live and breathe Friday night games.

name: Bluey
overview: A lovable Blue Heeler puppy and her family turn everyday life into imaginative play and adventures.

name: Yellowstone
overview: A Montana ranching family fights to protect their land against developers, politicians, and rivals.

name: Friends
overview: Six friends navigate life, love, and careers while living in New York City.

name: NCIS
overview: A team of special agents investigates crimes connected to the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps.

name: The Simpsons
overview: The satirical everyday life of a working-class family in the misfit town of Springfield.

name: Better Call Saul
overview: A small-time lawyer transforms into the morally compromised attorney Saul Goodman.

name: How I Met Your Mother
overview: A father recounts to his children the long and winding story of how he met their mother.

name: This Is Us
overview: A family across multiple time periods, following three siblings and their parents.

name: Pretty Little Liars
overview: Four friends are drawn together by the disappearance of their clique leader.

name: Rick and Morty
overview: An eccentric scientist drags his grandson on dangerous adventures across the multiverse.

name: House
overview: An antisocial, brilliant doctor solves baffling medical cases with his diagnostic team.

name: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
overview: A talented but immature detective and his diverse precinct colleagues solve crimes in Brooklyn.

name: Supernatural
overview: Two brothers hunt demons, ghosts, and other dangerous creatures across America.

name: The Blacklist
overview: A wanted fugitive surrenders and helps the FBI catch criminals on his secret list.

name: The Amazing World of Gumball
overview: The misadventures of a blue cat and his goldfish brother in the suburban town of Elmore.
